nodes.goal: Load Lower Manhattan OSM layers from a local PBF file and render the full layer stack.

dataflow.name: Autark PBF loading
dataflow.description: Loads OSM data for Lower Manhattan (Battery Park City + Financial District) from a local PBF file entirely in the browser via DuckDB-WASM — no server-side parsing. The backend serves lower_mnt.osm.pbf at GET /examples/data/<file>, mirroring the docs/examples/data/ path convention used by Python sandbox nodes.
